race.comment: BLINDEDBYTHELIGHT (3) ran out of her skin to finish less than a length behind Idle Flyer first-up in the Emancipation. That run may have flattened her as she didn't finish off as hoped last start in the Queen Of The South in Adelaide. Draws wide but it may not matter at this stage of the card. Can bounce back. TOMATO TOASTIE (15) had every chance but found one better at Listed level over 1400m at the Gold Coast last time out. Very fit now and looks ready for a first crack at the mile. PINITO (2) comes here off a six-week freshen-up. Failed twice after winning the Aspirations over the Randwick mile on 7 March. Handles the going and J Mac goes on so a few ticks. PIPPIE BEACH (5) was fair first-up on the Gold Coast but can improve sharply on her return to a heavy surface. OUR QUEEN (6) was hard to miss when runner-up in the Bernborough last Saturday. Untried in heavy ground which is the only concern.
